name: The Property Franchise Group PLC
summary: The Property Franchise Group PLC manages real estate properties in the United Kingdom. The company provides residential letting, estate agency, and property management services to tenants and landlords. It offers its services under the CJ Hole, Ellis & Co, Ewemove, Martin & Co, Parkers, and Whitegates brands. The company was formerly known as MartinCo PLC and changed its name to The Property Franchise Group PLC in March 2017. The Property Franchise Group PLC was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Bournemouth, the United Kingdom.
